creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
(In reply to John Hein from comment #49)

Correct, I have used that patch. Options are:

root@deblndw011x1j:/var/db/ports/x11-toolkits_pango
# less options
# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# Options for pango-1.42.4_2
_OPTIONS_READ=pango-1.42.4_2
_FILE_COMPLETE_OPTIONS_LIST=DOCS X11
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=DOCS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=X11
